name: Daniel Sloss
bio: Daniel Sloss is a Scottish comedian and writer known for confrontational, philosophical stand-up that mixes dark themes with personal candour. He performed a solo West End season at 19 and reached a global audience with the paired 2018 Netflix specials DARK and Jigsaw. His later work has tackled masculinity, relationships and sexual violence.

timeline.ev: Debuts at the Edinburgh Fringe at age sixteen
Becomes one of the youngest comedians to play a solo West End season
Releases the twin specials DARK and Jigsaw on Netflix
Premieres the acclaimed show X at the Edinburgh Fringe
Releases the specials SOCIO and HUBRIS

accolades: Performed solo shows across more than fifty countries
Jigsaw became a global Netflix hit credited by fans with prompting break-ups
X praised for material on masculinity and sexual violence
